content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
February 21, 2003

Charles Davis, City Clerk
City of Compton
Office of the City Clerk
205 South Willowbrook Avenue
Compton, CA 90220

Re: Your Request for Advice
File No.: W-03-030

Dear Mr. Davis:

This letter confirms the receipt of your February 5, 2003 request for advice regarding former Councilmember Fred Cressel. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the former council member for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your question or provide analysis.

Additionally, under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, your inquiry presents questions outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act").1

Please review the enclosed pamphlet, "Getting Advice From the FPPC," prior to submission of future advice requests.

Should you have additional questions, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
